    loadSplashEntries() - Static method in class gui.SplashEntryLoader
    Loads entries from the resources/entries.txt file, shuffles them, selects the first 5, and sorts them by date.

    Optimized version that achieves O(K) performance where K=5 is the number of entries needed.
